title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — beta.kubernetes.io/arch (deprecated)
text:
Type: Label
This label has been deprecated. Please use
kubernetes.io/arch
instead.

Type: Label
This label has been deprecated. Please use
kubernetes.io/os
instead.

Type: Label
Example:
kube-aggregator.kubernetes.io/automanaged: "onstart"
Used on: APIService
The
kube-apiserver
sets this label on any APIService object that the API server
has created automatically. The label marks how the control plane should manage that
APIService. You should not add, modify, or remove this label by yourself.
There are two possible values:
onstart
: The APIService should be reconciled when an API server starts up, but not otherwise.
true
: The API server should reconcile this APIService continuously.
